incident_narrative: Driving through debris on a flooded road caused a tyre puncture and road rash scratches on the lower sill.

policy.description: Budget comprehensive cover with standard age-based depreciation and no nil-depreciation add-on (glass is still always nil depreciation; rubber/plastic/tyre always 50% deduction). Tyre cover explicitly conditional on concurrent body damage.

coverage.text: [Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:] (cid:127) Tyre and tube damage at 50% of replacement cost, only when the vehicle has also been damaged in the same incident. (cid:127) Damage in transit by road, rail, or water. (cid:127) Landslide or rockslide damage.
coverage.heading: Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:

coverage.text: [Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:] Exceeding 10 years 50% Rubber, plastic, tyre, battery, and airbag parts: always 50% deduction. Glass parts: always nil deduction. You get the full replacement cost.
coverage.heading: Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:

coverage.text: [Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:] (cid:127) Breakage of headlight, taillight, or indicator units by accident or collision during the policy period. (cid:127) Glass damage without depreciation deduction - your windscreen, rear windscreen, and door windows are covered at full replacement cost as standard.
coverage.heading: Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:

exclusion_or_condition.text: [3.7 Tyre exclusions] (cid:127) Damage to non-standard tyres, including competition tyres or oversized tyres not conforming to the vehicle's type approval. (cid:127) Tyre valve cap or core damage alone, without tyre body damage.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: 3.7 Tyre exclusions

exclusion_or_condition.text: [3.7 Tyre exclusions] (cid:127) Tyre damage from use of the vehicle in rallying, track days, or any competitive motorsport event.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: 3.7 Tyre exclusions

exclusion_or_condition.text: [3.7 Tyre exclusions] 7. HOW TO CLAIM (cid:127) Call our helpline or use the app within 24 hours of the accident. (cid:127) Take photos of the damage before moving the vehicle if it is safe to do so. (cid:127) Get a repair estimate from a garage and share it with us before repairs start.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: 3.7 Tyre exclusions

exclusion_or_condition.text: 3.7 Tyre exclusions (cid:127) Tyre deterioration, tread wear, or sidewall cracking from age and use. (cid:127) Tyre damage when the vehicle was driven knowingly on a flat or underinflated tyre for a distance exceeding 2 km.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: 3.7 Tyre exclusions

exclusion_or_condition.text: [3.7 Tyre exclusions] 9. GENERAL EXCEPTIONS This policy does not cover any claim arising from war, nuclear risk, use of the vehicle in violation of permit conditions, or operation outside the specified geographical area.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: 3.7 Tyre exclusions
